## Release impact

- [ ] Browser runtime changed

## Verification

- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] `npm run test:e2e` when runtime or interactions changed
- [ ] Visual/audio manifest and provenance updated when assets changed
- [ ] No credential, provider response, `.env`, or generated work file added
- [ ] Production deployment and real-Chrome evidence updated when applicable
